'''wabala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracklessness|cracklessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracklessness|cracklessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wabala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæbælæth|wæbælæth]] || [[word:wæbælæj|wæbælæj]] || [[word:wæbælæsh|wæbælæsh]] || [[word:wæbælæ|wæbælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wababalath|wababalath]] || [[word:wababalaj|wababalaj]] || [[word:wababalash|wababalash]] || [[word:wababala|wababala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wabalath|wabalath]] || [[word:wabalaj|wabalaj]] || [[word:wabalash|wabalash]] || [[word:wabala|wabala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabaflafth|wabaflafth]] || [[word:wabaflafj|wabaflafj]] || [[word:wabaflafsh|wabaflafsh]] || [[word:wabaflaf|wabaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wabalatha|wabalatha]] || [[word:wabalaja|wabalaja]] || [[word:wabalasha|wabalasha]] || [[word:wabalaka|wabalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wabalath|wabalath]] || [[word:wabalaj|wabalaj]] || [[word:wabalash|wabalash]] || [[word:wabala|wabala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wabalathal|wabalathal]] || [[word:wabalajal|wabalajal]] || [[word:wabalashal|wabalashal]] || [[word:wabalakal|wabalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wabalaathatha|wabalaathatha]] || [[word:wabalaajaja|wabalaajaja]] || [[word:wabalaashasha|wabalaashasha]] || [[word:wabalaaka|wabalaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wabalathan|wabalathan]] || [[word:wabalajan|wabalajan]] || [[word:wabalashan|wabalashan]] || [[word:wabalakan|wabalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wabalathaoro|wabalathaoro]] || [[word:wabalajaoro|wabalajaoro]] || [[word:wabalashaoro|wabalashaoro]] || [[word:wabalakaoro|wabalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
